statement: Write contention on process_observability is a material second-order contributor to run latency and perceived instability under fanout load.
rationale: Convex insights show very high OCC retry volumes on recordProcessObservability and OCC interactions during applyRequestResult/handleRequestError against the same state surface.
keyAssumptions: Observed OCC retries correlate with runtime slowdown and retry churn
validationCriteria: Reducing observability write frequency/cardinality lowers OCC retry volume during equivalent load
Core run progression metrics improve without increasing failure rate
critiquePoints: Some OCC retries are benign and expected under concurrency
questions: Which observability writes are essential in hot paths versus deferrable?
